import{Graphics}from'@pixi/graphics';import{Container}from'@pixi/display';import{RoomObjectCategory}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/room';import{RoomObjectVariable}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/room';export class TargetHighlightOverlay{constructor(){this._outline=null;this._pulse=0;this._cachedUserId=0;this._cachedObjectId=0;this._cacheTtl=0;}dispose(){if(this._outline){this._outline.destroy(true);this._outline=null;}this._cachedUserId=0;this._cachedObjectId=0;this._cacheTtl=0;}update(engine){var _activeRoomActiveCanv,_rpTargetUserId;if(!engine)return;const roomId=engine.activeRoomId;if(roomId<0){this.hide();return;}const canvasId=(_activeRoomActiveCanv=engine._activeRoomActiveCanvas)!==null&&_activeRoomActiveCanv!==void 0?_activeRoomActiveCanv:1;const canvas=engine.getRoomInstanceRenderingCanvas(roomId,canvasId);if(!canvas||!(canvas.master instanceof Container)){this.hide();return;}const master=canvas.master;const overlay=master.getChildByName(engine.OVERLAY);if(!overlay){this.hide();return;}const targetUserId=(_rpTargetUserId=window.__rpTargetUserId)!==null&&_rpTargetUserId!==void 0?_rpTargetUserId:0;if(targetUserId<=0){this.hide();return;}const objectId=this.resolveRoomObjectIdByUserId(engine,roomId,targetUserId);if(objectId<=0){this.hide();return;}const if(this._outline.parent!==overlay){overlay.addChild(this._outline);}const paddingX=Math.max(4,rect.width*0.16);const paddingTop=Math.max(4,rect.height*0.08);const paddingBottom=Math.max(8,rect.height*0.14);const width=rect.width+paddingX*2;const height=rect.height+paddingTop+paddingBottom;const x=rect.x-paddingX;const y=rect.y-paddingTop;const radius=Math.max(8,Math.min(16,Math.min(width,height)*0.18));this._pulse+=0.08;const pulse=(Math.sin(this._pulse)+1)/2;const outerAlpha=0.25+pulse*0.2;const mainAlpha=0.85+pulse*0.15;const innerAlpha=0.55+pulse*0.15;const obj=engine.getRoomObjectByIndex(roomId,i,RoomObjectCategory.UNIT);if(!obj||!obj.model)continue;const directId=obj.model.getValue(RoomObjectVariable.SESSION_CURRENT_USER_ID);if(typeof directId==='number'&&directId===userId){this._cachedUserId=userId;this._cachedObjectId=obj.id;this._cacheTtl=now+500;return obj.id;}}this._cachedUserId=userId;this._cachedObjectId=0;this._cacheTtl=now+250;return 0;}}
